## Target system

- ID:
- Package or module:
- Current status:

## Claim to test

State the claim in measurable form.

## Baseline

- [ ] Baseline named
- [ ] Metric selected
- [ ] Dataset or synthetic case defined
- [ ] Expected limits listed

## Tests

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Regression tests
- [ ] Negative examples
- [ ] Reproducibility check

## Residues and M-

- [ ] What failed?
- [ ] What was uncertain?
- [ ] What must not be claimed yet?

## Promotion rule

- [ ] Status can remain the same
- [ ] Status can be promoted only with evidence attached
- [ ] Status must be reduced if residues contradict the claim
